title: eleocharis minutissima
intro: Eleocharis minutissima, also known as dwarf spikerush, is a small, perennial plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that grows in wetlands and marshy areas worldwide. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Eleocharis minutissima has been reported to offer several health benefits, including relief from urinary tract problems, fever reduction, and improved digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, and its roots are often used in traditional medicine.
